idea.hook: The Universe is expanding FASTER! But why?
facts: A mysterious force, Dark Energy, drives this accelerating expansion.
Quantum physics predicts empty space itself should contain 'vacuum energy'.
The predicted vacuum energy value is an unbelievable 10^120 times LARGER than the observed Dark Energy!
idea.payoff: This 10^120 discrepancy is the biggest theoretical error in physics, signaling a fundamental gap in our understanding of reality.
idea.title: Physics' Biggest BLUNDER! 🤯🌌

scenes.text:
The Universe Expands FASTER!
BUT WHY?
scenes.visual: Distant galaxies rapidly moving away from a central point, represented by streaking lights against a dark cosmic background.

scenes.text: Dark Energy: A mysterious force driving this acceleration.
scenes.visual: A swirling, dark purple energy field rippling across a galaxy cluster, suggesting an invisible influence.

scenes.text: Quantum physics predicts 'vacuum energy' in empty space.
scenes.visual: A subtle, shimmering quantum foam effect with tiny, glowing particles appearing and disappearing in what appears to be empty space.

scenes.text: Predicted vacuum energy is 10^120 TIMES LARGER than observed Dark Energy!
scenes.visual: A tiny, barely visible speck labeled 'Observed' next to a massive, exploding supernova labeled 'Predicted', with '10^120' flashing prominently.

scenes.text: This 10^120 discrepancy is the BIGGEST THEORETICAL ERROR in physics, signaling a fundamental gap in our understanding of reality.
scenes.visual: A cosmic background with a large, fractured mathematical equation or a broken bridge spanning a vast, dark abyss, emphasizing the '10^120' value.
